Legal

Privacy Policy

We take the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy informs you about how your personal data is processed when you use this website (GDPR-compliant).

1. Data Controller

[Name / company]
[Address]
Email: info@about-berlin-hotels.de

2. Server log files

When you access our website, our hosting provider automatically records information in server log files (IP address, date and time, browser type, etc.). Legal basis is Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR (legitimate interest in a technically functional website).

3. Cookies

We use cookies on this website. Technically necessary cookies are set on the basis of Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR. Optional cookies (e.g. statistics, marketing) are only set after your explicit consent (Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR) — see the cookie banner.

4. Google Tag Manager & Google Analytics 4

If you consent, we use Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics 4 (Google Ireland Ltd., Dublin 4, Ireland). Data is processed in anonymised form (IP masking active). Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR. Withdraw consent at any time via the cookie banner.

5. Stay22 hotel maps (embedded)

On individual pages we embed interactive maps by Stay22 Inc. (Canada) which display hotel offers from third parties such as Booking.com. Loading the map transmits your IP address to Stay22. Provider privacy policy: stay22.com/privacy. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR (consent) or Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR (legitimate interest).

6. Google Fonts

We load the „Inter" font via Google Fonts. Loading transmits your IP to Google. Legal basis: Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR (optimisation of font rendering).

7. Affiliate programmes

We participate in the Booking.com affiliate programme (via Stay22) and may participate in further partner programmes. Clicking an affiliate link redirects you to the provider's website. We may receive a commission.

8. Your rights

  • Access to your stored data (Art. 15 GDPR)
  • Rectification of incorrect data (Art. 16 GDPR)
  • Erasure of your data (Art. 17 GDPR)
  • Restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
  • Data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)
  • Objection to processing (Art. 21 GDPR)
  • Complaint to the competent supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR)

9. Contact for data protection inquiries

For data protection questions, please contact us at: info@about-berlin-hotels.de

About Berlin Hotels

About Berlin Hotels is an independent, editorial Berlin hotel guide.

We link to booking platforms and may earn a commission. Your price stays the same.

Cookies & tracking

We use cookies and tools (Google Analytics, Stay22 hotel maps) to improve this site. Technically necessary cookies are always active. Statistics & marketing are optional.
